name: TODO LIST APP
description: Implement todo list application with add, edit, delete, and mark complete functionalities.

workflows.name: Meeting Management Workflow
workflows.description: Core workflow for creating, updating, and managing clinic meetings
steps: User selects date and time for meeting
User enters meeting details (title, description, attendees)
User can edit or delete meeting

workflows.name: Meeting Completion Workflow
workflows.description: Workflow for marking meetings as complete and generating records
steps: Staff records meeting notes and outcomes
System sends completion notification to attendees

workflows.name: Calendar View & Scheduling Workflow
workflows.description: Workflow for viewing calendar and scheduling decisions
steps: System loads meetings for selected date range
System displays meetings in calendar view
User views meeting details on click

workflows.name: User Authentication & Authorization Workflow
workflows.description: Workflow for user authentication and role-based access control
steps: System generates JWT token if valid
User is granted access based on role
System restricts access to appropriate features

workflows.name: Audit & Activity Tracking Workflow
workflows.description: Workflow for logging all user actions and system events
steps: System logs action to audit log
System captures timestamp, user, entity, and changes
System maintains historical record for compliance
